titleStmt.title: SII 31.98: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 98. (A.R. No. B 265 of 1936.) PEDDACHINTAKUNṬA, SIRUVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the temple of Hanumān in front of the village Chāvaḍi.
It is dated Śaka year 1470, Kīlaka, Māgha, śu. 7, (Ratha-saptami) corresponding to December 11, Tuesday 1548 A.D.

States that China Timmayyadēva mahārāja son of Timmarāja, grandson of Rāmarāja and great grandson of Āṟavīṭi Bukkarāja, of Ātrēya gōtra and Sōmavaṁśa remitted the taxes such as Koṁnamāḷḷu, Jōḍimāḷḷu collected from lands Vṛittimānyam and Varimaḍimānyam belonging to the officials of village (grāma karaṇa) Chintakunṭa in Avuku-sīma in the Śaka year Plavaṅga.
Avuku-sīma, in which the gift lands situated was given as nāyaṁkara to the donor by the king Śadāśivadēva mahārāya.
1) Figres like a crescont a chakra, a corch. The sun and Vaishnava caste mark are engraved at the top.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣa
ṁbulu 1470 Agunēṭi kīlaka saṁvatsara māgha śu 7 mīluśrī
madrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpaśrī sadāśivadē
va mahārāyalugāru vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍuṁḍai
pṛdhivī sāṁmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīman mahā
maṁḍalēśvara Ātrēyagōtra pavitrulaina sōmavaṁśādhīśvarulaina śrīkṛ
ṣṇa pādāraviṁda dvitīyaśāvakulaina nissīma bhūdāna cakravarttu
laina parama dhārmmikulaina Āra vāṭi bukkarājugāri prapautṛulu rāma
rājugāri pautṛlu tiṁmmarājugāri putṛlu cinatiṁmmayyadēva ma
hārājulu vāru ciṁtakuṁṭa grāmakaraṇālaku yicina dharṁmma
śāsanaṁ . śrīsadāśivadēva mahārāyalugāru mānāyaṁka
rānaku pāliṁcina Avukusīmalō hōragrāmaṁ ciṁtakuṁṭagrā
ma karaṇālakuplavaṁgasaṁvvatsarāna mīkaraṇīkamānyālu vrirtti mānyā
lu varimaḍi mānyālakuṁnu koṁnnamāḷlu jōḍimāḷluṁnnu
radhasaptami puṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravōsi sarvvamānyaṁ Isti
migāna mīputrapautra pāraṁparyaṁ gānu Ācaṁdrārkka
mugānu Anubhaviṁcci bradikēdi . svadattāṁ paradattā vā
yōharēti vasuṁdhara ṣaṣṭhivarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
yatēkrimiḥ . yēkaika bhaginī lōkē sarvvēṣāṁyēva bhūbhujāṁ
na bhōjyā nakaragrāmyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā śrī śrī śrī .
This line is completely wornout
Digital edition of SII 31.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
